color: rgb(255, 224, 130) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📓 Credit Cards Scraper
─────────────────────────────
Databricks Notebook
─────────────────────────────
Source: bcp.com/tarjetas-de-credito
Scrapes BCP credit card product
pages on a scheduled trigger
Parses HTML into structured
Markdown files with product
details, rates, fees, requirements
─────────────────────────────
Output: .md files per product

div.style: color: rgb(255, 224, 130) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📓 Loans Scraper
─────────────────────────────
Databricks Notebook
─────────────────────────────
Source: bcp.com/prestamos
Scrapes BCP loan and personal
credit pages on schedule
Parses HTML into structured
Markdown with rates, terms,
eligibility and conditions
─────────────────────────────
Output: .md files per product

div.style: color: rgb(255, 224, 130) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🗄 UC Volume
─────────────────────────────
Unity Catalog Storage Layer
─────────────────────────────
/Volumes/catalog/schema/volume
─────────────────────────────
Stores all Markdown product
files written by scrapers
Single source of truth for
Knowledge Assistant indexing
Versioned · Access-controlled

div.style: color: rgb(255, 205, 210) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🧠 Knowledge Assistant
─────────────────────────────
Agent Bricks · KA
─────────────────────────────
Reads Markdown files from
UC Volume automatically
Chunks documents into
optimal retrieval segments
Embeds chunks with managed
embedding model
Auto-creates and maintains
Vector Search index
Full retrieval pipeline
end-to-end without custom code

div.style: color: rgb(255, 205, 210) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚡ KA Serving Endpoint
─────────────────────────────
Databricks Model Serving
─────────────────────────────
Exposes KA as REST API
Protocol: Streaming HTTP / SSE
POST /v1/conversations/completions
Auth: Databricks OAuth token
─────────────────────────────
Managed auto-scaling
Linked to MLflow experiment
for full trace observability

div.style: color: rgb(187, 222, 251) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
👤 BCP User
─────────────────────────────
Web Browser / HTTPS
─────────────────────────────
BCP staff or customers
asking product questions
in Spanish about credit
cards and personal loans

div.style: color: rgb(178, 235, 242) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚛ React Frontend
─────────────────────────────
React 18 + Vite 5 + Tailwind CSS 4
Components: Radix UI
State: Vercel AI SDK (@ai-sdk/react)
─────────────────────────────
Streaming chat UI renders
SSE tokens in real-time
Conversation history sidebar
Databricks auth integration

div.style: color: rgb(179, 229, 252) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🔧 Express Backend
─────────────────────────────
Express 5 + TypeScript
Vercel AI SDK · Zod validation
─────────────────────────────
POST /api/chat
Streams from KA Endpoint
Returns SSE to browser
GET /api/chats
Returns full chat history
Proxies KA Serving Endpoint
with token injection

div.style: color: rgb(128, 222, 234) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🐘 Lakebase
─────────────────────────────
Managed PostgreSQL
─────────────────────────────
ORM: Drizzle ORM
Schema: ai_chatbot
─────────────────────────────
Tables: User · Chat · Message_v2
─────────────────────────────
Auto-scaling compute
Persistent conversation history
Databricks-managed backups

div.style: color: rgb(225, 190, 231) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📊 MLflow Experiment
─────────────────────────────
Linked to KA experiment
─────────────────────────────
Captures span-level traces
for every KA conversation
Stores full input / output
pairs per span for analysis
Builds production evaluation
dataset automatically
Foundation for offline eval
and online production scoring

div.style: color: rgb(225, 190, 231) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🧪 MLflow GenAI Evaluation
─────────────────────────────
Trigger: CI/CD deploy gate
─────────────────────────────
Metric: RetrievalGroundedness
Threshold: ≥ 85% to pass
Test set: 10 curated Spanish
questions on cards and loans
─────────────────────────────
Blocks deployment on failure
Runs before every prod push

div.style: color: rgb(225, 190, 231) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📈 Production Monitor
─────────────────────────────
Sample rate: 100% of traffic
Registration: idempotent
─────────────────────────────
4 continuous online scorers:
· Groundedness
· Relevance
· Safety
· Language Attribution
(response_en_espanol)
─────────────────────────────
Alerts on quality regression

div.style: color: rgb(200, 230, 201) !important; font-style: italic !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚙ GitHub Actions + Databricks Asset Bundles
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Pipeline: Test → Evaluate (MLflow gate ≥ 85%) → Deploy
Targets: Dev (per-developer) · Staging (shared QA) · Prod (live traffic)
Deploys: notebooks · KA config · chat app bundle · DB schema migrations
